{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071013F5E77A70673F64A9F328"}"},"total":469},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594480290993832728","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别合心意，特别好看，剧情安排的挺紧凑的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768230906,"group_id":"7584004341749517336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/D3wYi269J2y95h9ETIZ6waDXMAfW49zFWEtCDznb76","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3079100554810199","user_name":"用户30791005"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3079100554810199","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774338422,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7584004341749517336","book_info":{"abstract":"重生2010，睁眼便是绝境。 父亲正颤抖着手，准备签下那份贱卖工厂的“卖身契”。
贪婪的资本家盯着脚下即将暴涨百倍的地皮，露出獠牙。
上一世，裴皓月软弱妥协，致使家破人亡。
这一世，他觉醒【全息工业仿真视野】，一眼看穿万物构造，誓要逆天改命！
变废为宝，狂揽第一桶金。
三万块被判死刑的“电子垃圾”主板？
在他手中暴力魔改，化身席卷华强北的“插卡音箱”，一夜狂赚数百万，让资本家目瞪口呆！
然而，真正的转折才刚刚开始。
面对权贵以“学术造假”污蔑，所有人以为他会跪地求饶保全前程。
裴皓月却当众甩出一纸《自愿退学申请书》，狠狠打在对方脸上： “即便没有这一纸证书，我也会走上通往工业巅峰的霸道！”
退学，是为了更凶猛的进攻。
转身离开象牙塔，他南下东莞，招揽被学界抛弃的“疯子”天才，建立神秘的材料实验室。
从一支这一年还没人看懂的“能量棒”开始，到固态电池、高端芯片……
他要在那个野蛮生长的年代，用技术筑起高墙。
这一世，他要做那站在巅峰的科技巨擎，让所有试图卡住自己脖子的手，寸寸折断！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/50722b6247478b8e950fa85b430cc5b4","author":"爱吃百万西红柿","author_id":"","book_id":"7584004341749517336","book_name":"破壁垒：从学术造假，到科技巨擘","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0c098","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7584004368685351448","read_count":"32480","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1108459"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"414","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,重生,大佬,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oaa40c7da0da4187b824f96a646589b1b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318613&x-signature=DB6%2B0fU4urudedjo8oLI03c317M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2784402953478419","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322071013F5E77A70673F64A9F328"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwa
